title: Implement --squash for build-using-dockerfile and commit
body: Handle a Squash option when committing images, and make it available as a flag for `buildah commit` and `buildah build-using-dockerfile`.

comments.body: Couple of minor Nits, but LGTM
Fixed, added tests to exercise `build-using-dockerfile` and verify that a file removed in an intermediate layer is not in the final image.

F27 RPM build test failing in RH CI.  We'd issues with this yesterday too, all unrelated to any Buildah changes.  Should we kill/ignore that test?

not ok 115 rpm-build Fedora 27
